style_patterns.sentence_structure: Simple sentences, mix of telegraphic bullets and full first-person sentences.
examples: Looking after the babies in the nursery room (0-2 years).
Achievement: I got "Employee of the Month" in March 2023 because I did a really good Easter display on the wall.
I learned how to be really polite even when customers are grumpy in the morning.

flagged_issues.description: Unprofessional email address not suitable for job applications.
Inclusion of a family member as a professional reference.
flagged_issues.original:
My Mum (Sandra)
She can tell you how much I love kids!

flagged_issues.description: Spelling error in the job title within the cover letter.
flagged_issues.original: Job Application for Early Childhood Educater
flagged_issues.suggested: Job Application for Early Childhood Educator

flagged_issues.description: Spelling error in a section heading.
Overly casual and subjective language in objective statement.
flagged_issues.original: To find a fun and stable job in a child care center where I can use my skills to help kids learn and have the best time ever.
flagged_issues.suggested: To secure a part-time Assistant Educator role where I can apply my skills in child development and create a positive, engaging learning atmosphere.

flagged_issues.description: Inconsistent point of view, mixing third-person bullets with first-person sentences.
flagged_issues.original: I learned how to be really polite even when customers are grumpy in the morning.
flagged_issues.suggested: Developed strong customer service skills, maintaining a polite and positive demeanor in all situations.

flagged_issues.description: Informal and unprofessional phrasing for a key responsibility.
flagged_issues.original: Helping with nappy changes (lots of them!).
flagged_issues.suggested: Managed daily hygiene routines for infants, including nappy changes.

flagged_issues.description: Inconsistent use of trailing periods on bullet points.
flagged_issues.original: Setting up the room in the morning with toys and books.
flagged_issues.suggested: Setting up the room in the morning with toys and books

flagged_issues.description: Incorrect word usage in cover letter.
flagged_issues.original: When I read your add about being a "community"
flagged_issues.suggested: When I read your ad about being a "community"

flagged_issues.description: Unnecessary and unprofessional personal quote at the top of the CV.
flagged_issues.original: "Giving every child a smile every single day!"
